files.patch:
@@ -131,3 +131,3 @@ - * The validity period consists of two date/time values: - * the first and last dates (and times) on which the certificate - * is valid. It is defined in + * The validity period consists of two time values: + * the first and last times on which the certificate is valid. + * It is defined in @@ -175,1 +175,1 @@ - * certificate would be valid at the given date/time. + * certificate would be valid at the given instant. @@ -188,1 +188,1 @@ - * with respect to the {@code instant} supplied. + * with respect to {@code Instant} supplied. @@ -190,1 +190,2 @@ - * yet valid with respect to the {@code instant} supplied. + * yet valid with respect to {@code Instant} supplied. + * @throws NullPointerException if supplied is {@code Instant} is null. @@ -350,1 +351,1 @@ - * @see #checkValidity + * @see #checkValidity(Date) @@ -357,12 +358,0 @@ - * The relevant ASN.1 definitions are: - * 
-     * validity             Validity
-     *
-     * Validity ::= SEQUENCE {
-     *     notBefore      CertificateValidityDate,
-     *     notAfter       CertificateValidityDate }
-     *
-     * CertificateValidityDate ::= CHOICE {
-     *     utcTime        UTCTime,
-     *     generalTime    GeneralizedTime }
-     *
@@ -377,0 +366,2 @@ + * @throws NullPointerException when {@code getNotBefore()} returns null. + * @@ -378,1 +369,1 @@ - * @see #checkValidity + * @see #checkValidity(Instant) @@ -383,1 +374,4 @@ - return date == null ? null : date.toInstant(); + if (date == null) { + throw new NullPointerException("notBefore is null"); + } + return date.toInstant(); @@ -392,1 +386,1 @@ - * @see #checkValidity + * @see #checkValidity(Date) @@ -408,0 +402,3 @@ + * The {@code Date} returned by {@code getNotAfter()} should not be null. + * + * @throws NullPointerException when {@code getNotAfter()} returns null. @@ -410,1 +407,1 @@ - * @see #checkValidity + * @see #checkValidity(Instant) @@ -415,1 +412,4 @@ - return date == null ? null : date.toInstant(); + if (date == null) { + throw new NullPointerException("notAfter is null"); + } + return date.toInstant();
